description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a pull tab opening on top. The can features a two-tone label design: the upper portion is a textured, metallic gray with a woodgrain-like pattern, while the lower portion is a deep navy or black, separated by a thin gold line. The front of the can displays bold, serif typography and a crest-like emblem, with additional product details such as alcohol content and style. The back and sides of the can include a barcode, nutritional information, and legal disclaimers in small print. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, typical of aluminum beverage cans, and there are no visible signs of condensation or damage.
description: A metallic beer can with a textured gray and dark navy label, gold accent, and pull tab top. The can features bold typography and a crest emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with crest emblem, bold text, and pull tab partially open.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the top pull tab and small print details, with the label's woodgrain pattern prominent.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the barcode and additional product information, with the pull tab visible.
description_view_3: Alternate front view focusing on the crest emblem and main product details, with the pull tab centered.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a metallic woodgrain pattern on the upper half, a deep navy lower section, and a thin gold accent line. Bold serif typography and a crest emblem dominate the front, with smaller text and a barcode on the sides.
